title: RBI cancels Certificate of Registration of 54 NBFCs
description: The Reserve Bank of India, in exercise of powers conferred on it under Section 45-IA (6) of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, has cancelled the Certificate of Registration of the following companies. S. No. Name of the Company Registered Office Address CoR No. CoR issued on Cancellation order date 1 Chefair Impex Ltd 8, Grant Lane, Ground Floor, Kolkata, West Bengal - 700012 13.00729 April 20, 1998 March 10, 2026 2 Umeed Leasing & Finance Limited H.No. 504 1/6 S/F Netaji Subhash Marg, Dar
